avalancheActivity.highlights: New snow and wind slabs in all aspects. New snow represents the main danger.
avalancheActivity.comment: As a consequence of new snow and a strong to storm force northeasterly wind, sometimes large wind slabs formed by the evening in particular in places that are protected from the wind. High-altitude starting zones have been replenished further quickly. In all aspects medium-sized slab avalanches are possible as a consequence of the snowfall. In particular on wind-loaded slopes the avalanches can be released in deep layers of the snowpack and reach large size.

snowpackStructure.comment: The old snowpack is moist. The new snow can be released naturally.

avalancheActivity.highlights: New snow and wind slabs in the early morning. The new snow represents the main danger.
avalancheActivity.comment: As a consequence of new snow and a sometimes storm force wind, sometimes avalanche prone wind slabs formed in the course of the day in all aspects. In particular on very steep slopes individual small and medium sized avalanches are possible as the snowfall becomes more intense.

snowpackStructure.comment: The new snow will be deposited on the quite favourable surface of an old snowpack in particular on shady slopes.
